Commitment formula:   keccak256(abi.encodePacked(answer, salt, msg.sender, bountyId)) Flow:   1. commit(bountyId, hash)        — before bounty deadline   2. reveal(bountyId, answer, salt) — after deadline, within reveal window   3. AIJudge.judgeAll only considers entries where revealed == true

documentation.text:
@title CommitReveal
 @notice Commit-reveal scheme scoped per bounty, compatible with AIJudge.
 Commitment formula:
   keccak256(abi.encodePacked(answer, salt, msg.sender, bountyId))
 Flow:
   1. commit(bountyId, hash)        — before bounty deadline
   2. reveal(bountyId, answer, salt) — after deadline, within reveal window
   3. AIJudge.judgeAll only considers entries where revealed == true
@notice How long after the commit deadline the reveal window stays open.
